cards.title: Gut Microbiome
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Phyla: Firmicutes, Bacteroidetes, Proteobacteria
  • Dysbiosis patterns in disease
  • Testing: GI-MAP, comprehensive stool analysis
  • Probiotic strain selection

cards.title: IBS & SIBO
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Rome IV criteria for IBS
  • SIBO breath test (lactulose/glucose)
  • Low-FODMAP diet protocol (phases 1, 2, 3)
  • Naturopathic treatment: Herbs, probiotics, diet

cards.title: IBD & Coeliac Disease
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Crohn's vs UC differentiation
  • Coeliac: Anti-tTG IgA, biopsy findings
  • Naturopathic support during remission
  • Nutritional deficiencies in IBD

cards.title: Liver & Gut-Cancer Axis
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • NAFLD: Grading, lifestyle intervention
  • Gut-liver axis in liver disease

  • Colorectal cancer prevention diet
